nodes.label: Chuskit Goes to School
nodes.description: Disability, inclusion, and life in Ladakh

nodes.label: Chuskit's Story
nodes.description: A girl in Ladakh who wants to go to school

nodes.label: Uses a Wheelchair
nodes.description: Chuskit cannot walk and uses a wheelchair to move

nodes.label: Rocky Path to School
nodes.description: Hilly and rough terrain makes travel very hard

nodes.label: What is Inclusion?
nodes.description: Including everyone in activities regardless of ability

nodes.label: Right to Education
nodes.description: Every child aged 6-14 has the right to free schooling

nodes.label: Making Places Accessible
nodes.description: Ramps, wide doors, and smooth paths for all

nodes.label: Life in Ladakh
nodes.description: A cold, mountainous region in northern India

nodes.label: High Mountains
nodes.description: Surrounded by Himalayas and Karakoram ranges

nodes.label: Community Support
nodes.description: People working together to help everyone

nodes.label: Empathy & Kindness
nodes.description: Understanding others' feelings and helping them

nodes.label: Working Together
nodes.description: Villagers built a path so Chuskit could reach school

nodes.label: Different Abilities
nodes.description: Everyone has unique strengths and talents
